transcript_segments.text: Tired of dull, tired-looking skin every morning?
transcript_segments.speaker: narrator

transcript_segments.text: I used to hate what I saw in the mirror.
transcript_segments.speaker: narrator

transcript_segments.text: Then I found GlowUp Serum, and everything changed.
transcript_segments.speaker: narrator

transcript_segments.text: Clinically proven to brighten skin in just two weeks.
transcript_segments.speaker: narrator

transcript_segments.text: Shop now at glowup dot com and get your glow back.
transcript_segments.speaker: narrator

scene_segments.visual_description: Close-up of a tired-looking woman in dim bathroom lighting, muted color palette, blue-gray tones.
Same woman looking into a mirror, frustrated expression, still dim lighting.
Bright, warm-lit shot of the GlowUp Serum bottle on a marble counter, hand picking it up. Contains a brief jump-cut around 6.0-6.3s.
Split-screen before/after of the woman's skin, bright even lighting, warm tones.
End card, product bottle centered, logo bottom-right, on-screen URL text.

detected_claims.text: Clinically proven to brighten skin in just two weeks.

detected_ctas.text: Shop now at glowup dot com

creative_brief: GlowUp Serum 15-second TikTok ad. Required message: highlight the 'clinically proven brightening in 2 weeks' claim and drive viewers to glowup.com. Tone should be relatable and aspirational, targeting women 25-40 interested in skincare. Required CTA: 'Shop now at glowup.com'. Brand logo must appear in the final 3 seconds.
product_context: GlowUp Serum is a vitamin C brightening serum. Product page lists ingredients and a 'visible results in 2-4 weeks with consistent use' claim based on an internal 4-week user survey (n=32), not a formal clinical study.
